steps.title: Identify the core prediction being challenged
steps.content: The assumption makes this specific prediction: species that build domed nests have larger geographic ranges than species that build open nests.

steps.title: Match to the direct contradiction
steps.content: Choice D directly demonstrates the opposite: open-nest species have larger ranges than domed-nest species. Choices A, B, and C discuss extinction rates, body size, and nesting materials respectively — none directly address range size. That matches choice D — D is correct.
